name: Set Compression Level
desc: Changes the compression threshold mid-game. Same as S03 but for PLAY state.

implementation.overview: S46 dynamically changes compression threshold during PLAY state. Sent rarely — usually at login only (S03). No module in the examined client sources targets this packet.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S46PacketSetCompressionLevel)
modules.purpose: Server sends S46PacketSetCompressionLevel to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
